title: Tomita–Takesaki modular theory of the Bost–Connes algebra at β = 1, Lean 4 formalization
description:
Lean 4 formalization companion to the math.OA submission. This repository implements the structural chain for Theorems A–E of the paper "Tomita–Takesaki modular theory of the Bost–Connes algebra at β = 1, formalized in Lean 4" (companion paper DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20674870).

Mathlib pinned at SHA 5e932f97 (v4.29.1). The chain L1 → L7 + Theorem A–E is verified with zero sorry count and eight named programme-level axioms (six carrying documented literature citations, two recording Mathlib infrastructure gaps with documented discharge paths). Six scaffold-layer placeholders and one Lean substrate hypothesis (hSubstrate_iii for Theorem C) are inventoried in §§8.2–8.3 of the paper.

Substrate: a 230-line file Antilinear.lean develops polar decomposition for unbounded antilinear operators (current Mathlib gap), proposed for upstream contribution.

v0.2 release: namespace + directory rename — Integers.TomitaTakesaki.* → TomitaTakesaki.*; AI-collaboration disclosure added per artifact-level discipline.

During the preparation of this work, the author used Claude Opus 4.7.

subjects.term: 46L60 (Applications of selfadjoint operator algebras to physics)
